/usr/bin/c++     CMakeFiles/http_test.dir/http_test.cc.o  -o ../../output/debug/bin/http_test   -L/home/ruanjian/workspace/project_pre/protocol/./lib/debug  -L/home/ruanjian/workspace/project_pre/protocol/./lib/release  -L/home/ruanjian/workspace/project_pre/protocol/./output/debug/lib  -L/home/ruanjian/workspace/project_pre/protocol/./output/release/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ruanjian/workspace/project_pre/protocol/./lib/debug:/home/ruanjian/workspace/project_pre/protocol/./lib/release:/home/ruanjian/workspace/project_pre/protocol/./output/debug/lib:/home/ruanjian/workspace/project_pre/protocol/./output/release/lib -lprotocol -lhttp -ljson -lgmock -lgmock_main -lgtest -lgtest_main -lbuffer -lpthread -lmessage -lsystem_util
